[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 40
- Description: dao_protocol PR2: implemented /proxy/gas GAS cross-border proxy (Python) + reshaped migration roadmap
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/34
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/191
  
  Details:
  PR2 of the Edgar to dao_protocol extraction. Ported Rails ProxyController#gas into the Python service (allowlist of 9 GAS upstreams kept in lockstep with dapp routes.js + the Rails controller, CORS preflight, GET raw-query and POST raw-body passthrough, follow-redirects, 30s timeout, upstream status/content-type echoed, 502 on failure; reuses the existing requests dependency, 5 mocked tests pass). Deployed to seni_ror_new:8010 and verified end to end via the /dao-protocol/proxy/gas test prefix; production /proxy/gas traffic still on Rails (gate off per the decoupled strategy). Also reshaped EDGAR_DAO_EXTRACTION_PLAN: each Python PR is implementation-only with cutover as a separate reversible per-route ramp, using a two-tier gate (nginx split_clients/mirror for anonymous routes, the already-installed Rails split gem keyed on contributor identity for /dao and risky writes), with an exactly-one-backend rule for write paths.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 66.67

- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
